history.subject: Picard/SchematicSupport: descent-iso affine heart — for I ≤ Ann_R M the closed-immersion unit m ↦ 1⊗ₜm : M → (R⧸I)⊗_R M is bijective (M ≃ₗ (R⧸I)⊗M), the sections-level iso step of F ≅ i_*i^*F needing only annihilator_ideal_le, not the blocked sharpness reverse

Reduce nonconstant-map gate to base-change-free Proj-model gate: ExistsNonconstantMapToP1 C follows from a nonconstant morphism C ⟶ Proj ℤ[X₀,X₁] via pullback.lift over the terminal object (ℙ¹_k = Spec k ×_⊤ Proj), discharging the over-k/base-change bookkeeping and isolating the residual curve theory in ExistsNonconstantMapToProjInt

RR χ-ledger N14: local step dimension ≤ residue degree via k-linear injection into the single-point valuation quotient (κ(P)-target); field-of-constants gate, k-submodule sections, DVR order↔stalk-integrality bridge

Substantive Abel map Div_{C/k} → Pic^♯_{C/k}, [D] ↦ [O(D)] = −[ker q]: repin HasAbelMap to a data-carrying class carrying abelKernelNatTrans ≫ picNeg; kernel–base-change naturality via the invertible pullback–kernel comparison
P1 chart-ring span core: (𝒜 0)-span of coordinate powers X₁/X₀ exhausts the degree-zero away ring (ℤ[X₀,X₁]_{X₀})₀ (route step 1)

RR χ-ledger N15/N16: k-dimension ledger (coboundary/H¹ as k-vector spaces, χ:=ℓ-h¹), 4-term exact-sequence alternating dimension identity, χ-additivity χ(D')=χ(D)+dim(𝒜(D')/𝒜(D)) gated on the ledger exact sequence, and Riemann inequality deg D + χ(0) ≤ ℓ(D) via i(D)≥0

N5 cocycle layer: product-typed Cech differentials d01/d12 with componentwise coface formulas, restriction calculus (trans/self/injective/iso) for the opens poset, and the overlap 1-cocycle q ↦ (0,q,−q,0) with its 8-index cocycle proof (kernel membership in d¹)

N5 kernel half: ker d¹ = {(0,q,−q,0)} — diagonal components vanish, off-diagonal r = −q, and the k-linear equivalence overlapKerEquiv : Γ(U₁⊓U₂,F) ≃ₗ ker d¹ via the overlap cocycle and the (0,1)-projection

N5 CLOSED (unconditional): cechCohomology(2-cover, deg 1) ≃ₗ H1Cok via ker d¹/im d⁰ — pair lift/proj section of Č⁰, d⁰∘pair = −overlap cocycle of sectionDiff, range identification κ(im sectionDiff) = im toCycles, homology assembled through isoSc'+moduleCatHomologyIso; N6 corollary hModuleOneEquivH1Cok under the HasCechToHModuleIso gate

N12 consumable (gated): genus finiteness Module.Finite k H¹(C,𝒪_C) from HasFiniteMapToP1 + P1HasLaurentChartData + HasExt + ∀-cover HasCechToHModuleIso, composing the N11 keystone with the N5+N6 comparison; Cokernel header updated to record the landed N5 identification
